headline: Cybersecurity Firm TAC Security Surpasses 10,000 Clients, Emerges Among the Top 5 Vulnerability Management, AppSec Companies Globally
summary: NEW YORK, March 31, 2026--Cybersecurity Firm TAC Security Surpasses 10,000 Clients, Emerges Among the Top 5 Vulnerability Management, AppSec Companies Globally.

headline: Senior Researchers From NVIDIA, Samsung, NASA, University of Toronto Join AXL to Bring Global AI Expertise to Canadian Venture Creation
summary: TORONTO, March 31, 2026--AXL, a Canadian venture studio transforming applied AI research into high-growth companies, has announced its inaugural cohort of Faculty Fellows, a group of nine distinguished researchers, all professors at the University of Toronto (U of T), whose work spans computer vision, machine learning, and beyond at some of the world’s leading organizations.

headline: GitLab, Samsara, Intuit, Workday, and Autodesk Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after sentiment improved as President Trump indicated that the US was engaged in serious, productive talks with Iran.
